steps.title: Write vertex form
steps.content:
The maximum height is $282.24$ feet at $4.2$ seconds, so the vertex form is
$$h(t)=a(t-4.2)^2+282.24$$

steps.title: Solve for the time
steps.content: Set the height equal to $250.88$. $$250.88=-16(x-4.2)^2+282.24$$ $$(x-4.2)^2=1.96$$ $$x-4.2=\pm 1.4$$ $$x=2.8\quad \text{or}\quad x=5.6$$ A possible value is requested. The answer is 2.8.
